TenantID.title: Tenant ID
TenantID.description: Per-customer Personify360 tenant subdomain. The connector builds URLs as https://{TenantID}.personifycloud.com/ — without this the connector cannot reach the customer's Personify cloud.

ClientID.title: Client ID
ClientID.description: Personify OAuth Client ID provisioned via the Personify admin UI for an Integration application.

ClientSecret.title: Client Secret
ClientSecret.description: Personify OAuth Client Secret paired with the Client ID.
